phdOffers.title: PhD in Finance (PhD-FIN) — Fall 2026
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral research in finance with UAE/GCC focus; corporate finance, financial markets, econometrics
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Graduate assistantships (tuition waiver + monthly stipend) available via admission application; competitive selection by department

supervisors.name: Dr. Osamah Al-Khazali (Head, Department of Finance)

phdOffers.notes: Re-verified wave 2 (2026-07-12): program page still live, non-assistantship Fall 2026 deadline July 23, 2026 still open. Faculty page enumerates full PhD-FIN faculty roster with specializations (Corporate Finance, M&A, Corporate Governance, Islamic Banking, Risk Management, Portfolio Management); named supervisors above selected for closest fit to corporate finance/M&A/compliance focus. Individual faculty emails are masked on the public page (not disclosed) — no email fabricated; department contact ogs@aus.edu retained as principal contact. Dual PhD track with University of South Carolina Darla Moore School of Business confirmed (2nd year abroad option, co-supervision).

phdOffers.title: PhD in Business Administration — Finance Concentration (Fall 2026)
phdOffers.subject: Finance-focused doctoral training in business administration; research methods, qualifying exam, dissertation
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Graduate assistantships available on admission application; English-medium program

supervisors.name: School of Business Administration Graduate Admissions

phdOffers.notes: Re-verified wave 2: same July 23, 2026 deadline for applicants not requesting assistantship, unchanged. Finance concentration draws on the same PhD-FIN finance faculty roster documented on the Department of Finance page (see ae-aus-phd-finance-fall2026-001 for named specialists).

phdOffers.title: Doctor of Philosophy — School of Business (Finance research areas)
phdOffers.subject: PhD research in Accounting, Finance, Economics, Management, Marketing; finance priorities include Sustainable Finance, FinTech, Behavioural Finance, Applied Finance
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Competitive admission; contact admissions for scholarship/stipend availability; tuition-funded unless award granted

supervisors.name: Dr Vikash Ramiah (Associate Professor, Head of Postgraduate Studies)

phdOffers.notes: Re-verified wave 2: deadline unchanged, Aug 20, 2026 09:00; open day held July 18, 2026 confirms program still actively recruiting. 2026 research priorities restrict acceptance to Accounting, Finance, Marketing, SCM and Analytics disciplines aligned to Theme 1 (AI/Digital Transformation) or Theme 2 (Sustainable/ESG). Named Head of Postgraduate Studies (Dr Vikash Ramiah, research area Sustainable Finance/FinTech/Behavioural Finance/Applied Finance) sourced from official program page faculty block; email not published, not fabricated.

phdOffers.institution: University of Dubai — Dubai Business School
phdOffers.title: Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) — Applied Business Research
phdOffers.subject: Applied business doctoral research aligned with UAE/GCC economic development; finance, governance, and management topics
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Program fee approx. AED 270,000 total per catalog; limited cohort (max 12); no guaranteed scholarship on official regulations
phdOffers.notes: Re-verified wave 2: the program-details page (ud.ac.ae/phd-program-details) still publicly displays a stale 2024-2025 key-dates table (opened 1 Nov 2024, deadline 31 Aug 2025) — not yet updated for the 2026-2027 cycle. Official academic regulations confirm applications are accepted January through mid-September each year, so a 2026-09-15-style deadline remains the best estimate; treat as provisional until program office confirms current-cycle dates. Second contact (Aeman Sabre) added from the same official page for application-submission inquiries.

phdOffers.fundingDetails: KAIST International Graduate Scholarship (KGPS/KPS): full tuition, health insurance, monthly stipend (KRW 1,000,000 MS track / KRW 300,000 PhD KPS per official scholarship page); auto-considered on application
phdOffers.notes: Re-verified wave 2: KAIST official timeline page reconfirms Spring 2027 international application window August 18 – September 1, 2026, unchanged. Management Engineering offers MS, MS-PhD integrated, and PhD. English-friendly Seoul campus.

Restricted to teaching staff without prior PhD; online admission+SPF checkbox closed July 9, 2026, but physical/document submission remains open until July 31, 2026 per Spring 2027 guidelines.

phdOffers.notes: NEW wave-2 discovery: Yonsei's official master admissions schedule confirms international-track application window Oct 7–14, 2026 for the Spring 2027 (March 2027) intake, university-wide. GSIS (100% English instruction, 57% international enrollment) runs an International Trade, Finance & Management major offering a PhD in International Studies / PhD in Strategy & Organization per Yonsei's official scholarship overview page. GSIS's own Spring 2027 admissions guideline (with department-specific quotas/deadlines) had not yet been published as of 2026-07-12 — confirm exact GSIS deadline nearer the window; general graduate-school Fall 2026 cycle for this track already closed (see skippedClosed).

summary.waveNotes: Wave 2 refresh (2026-07-12): re-verified all 18 prior offers against live official sources; no offers moved to closed. Enriched named supervisors from official faculty pages for AUS PhD-FIN (4 named finance faculty), UOWD (named Head of Postgraduate Studies), University of Dubai (added second official contact), and SNU SPF (added contact email + eligibility/value detail directly from OGA page). Added 1 new offer: Yonsei GSIS International Trade, Finance & Management PhD track (Spring 2027). Confirmed via live checks: Khalifa University still fully closed for postgraduate admissions and lacks a standalone finance PhD; Zayed University has no PhD studentship program (faculty-only hiring); JREC-IN yields only faculty-level accounting/finance postings, not funded doctoral positions. No fabricated emails or LinkedIn URLs — all contact fields are either sourced verbatim from official pages or left null.
